name: MAX DRIVE 16V DRILL KIT
description:
No-Load Speed: Low 0-360 rpm
High 0-1550 rpm

Torque: 27 N-m
Capacity: 3/8 (10mm)
Clutch: 11 Sections
Weight: 1.045kg (With Battery) (Battery 0.32kg)

• Two speed variable
• Aluminium clutch ring
• Powerful 4 pole motor
• Gear box with spindle lock function
• All steel chuck
• Ergonomic soft grip handle for comfortable use
• Charging Time: 1 hour auto cut-off (±10min)

Contents:
• 16v 2 Speed Drill/Driver
• 1pc x 2.0Ah Li-Ion Batteries
• 1pc Battery Charger

MAX LITHIUM BATTERIES

The SP Max drive cordless range is powered by next-gen INR chemistry battery cells. The INR chemistry combines the safety and low resistance of Manganese and the high energy capacity of Nickel. When we combine these cells with Max Core electronics, the result is a battery pack with superior performance and safety or in simple terms, the very best available.

  • Longer run time
  • Less charging
  • Power when you need it
  • Stronger coated contacts
  • Longer life - More than double the recharges of normal lithium batteries

SP Hand Tools are covered against manufacturing defects or faulty materials. This warranty does not cover overloading, abuse, misuse and/or normal wear and tear. name: SP BOTTLE OPENER
description:
Add a touch of craftsmanship to your beverage routine with the SP Tools 10mm Spanner Bottle Opener. Ingeniously crafted from a genuine 10mm spanner, this bottle opener is not only functional but also a nod to the professional tradesperson. Perfect for opening your favorite beverages after a long day at work or during your leisure time, this unique tool combines practicality with a bit of fun.

Features:

  • Unique Design: Made from an authentic 10mm spanner, giving it a distinctive look.
  • Durable Construction: High-quality metal ensures long-lasting use.
  • Easy to Use: Effortlessly opens bottles with its spanner-end design.
  • Compact and Portable: Small enough to carry with you or fit in a tool bag.
  • Perfect Gift: Ideal for mechanics, DIY enthusiasts, and anyone who appreciates quality tools.
Whether you're in the garage or relaxing with friends, the SP Tools 10mm Spanner Bottle Opener is a handy and stylish accessory. Show off your love for tools in a fun and practical way with this one-of-a-kind bottle opener.

name: CAN OBDII/EOBD CODE READER-SCANNER
description:
• Works with OBDII compliant vehicles, including next generation protocol, Control Area Network (CAN). Access is provided by the vehicle manufacturer, as mandated by legislation in Australia & NZ 2006, USA – 1996, Europe (petrol) 2001, Europe (diesel) 2004.
    Note: Not compatible with Japanese vehicles using JOBD protocol.
  • Reads and clears generic and manufacturer specific diagnostic trouble codes (DTC’s) and turns off check engine light
  • Supports multiple trouble code requests: Generic codes, pending codes, and manufacturer specific codes
  • Code definitions are displayed on unit screen
  • Reviews the emission readiness status of OBDII Monitors
  • Determines malfunction indicator lamp (MIL) status
  • Retrieves VIN (Vehicle Identification No.) on 2002 and newer vehicles that support Mode 9
  • Reviews live data on unit screen
  • Easy to use with one plug in, highly reliable and accurate
  • Stand-alone unit with no need for an additional laptop/computer to operate
  • Small in size and comfortably fits in the palm of your hand
  • Unit updates via internet by USB cable
  • Software CD with over 10,000 DTC definitions included
  • No batteries needed as the unit is powered via OBD2 cable

name: CAN OBDII/EOBD/JOBD CORE READER SCANNER
description:
• Compatible with all vehicles made in 1996 or later that are JOBD/OBDII/EOBD compliant, including CAN, J1850 PWM, J1850 VPW, ISO9141, and KWP2000 protocols
  • Works with OBDII 16 PIN Toyota, Honda, Daihatsu, Mitsubishi, Mazda, Nissan, Suzuki, & Subaru
  • Reads and clears generic and manufacturer-specific diagnostic trouble codes (DTC’s) and turns off the check engine light
  • Provides wider vehicle coverage with CAN protocol support
  • Supports multiple trouble code requests: Generic codes, pending codes, and manufacturer-specific codes
  • Displays code definitions on the unit screen
  • Checks the emission readiness status of OBDII Monitors
  • Determines the malfunction indicator lamp (MIL) status
  • Retrieves VIN (Vehicle Identification No.) on 2002 and newer vehicles that support Mode 9
  • Displays live data on the unit screen, including a live data graph with four items in one screen
  • Standalone unit that does not require an additional laptop or computer to operate
  • Compact size that comfortably fits in the palm of your hand
  • Unit can be updated via the internet using a USB cable
  • Includes a software CD with over 10,000 DTC definitions
  • No batteries needed as the unit is powered via the OBD2 cable
  • 2.8” TFT color screen displays more information on the screen

name: CUSTOM SERIES - WOODEN WORKTOP
description:
The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

  • 40mm thick rubber wood worktop
  • With coating to prevent absorption of liquids
  • Fits all wide custom series Roller Cabinets

name: MAX DRIVE 16V GREASE GUN KIT
description:
The new SP Max Drive power tool program has been developed to offer superior performance to automotive, industrial and trade applications.

The core to this program is the Max Core microprocessors that offers the ultimate charger to battery to tool interface to improve outright performance. We have embedded microprocessors in all three components to give users longer run times, charge and discharge protection, intelligent current flow and temperature protection. With SP Max Drive using Max Core technology we can offer more work time, more power, more recharges and ultimately better performing tools. 

  • Voltage: 16 Volt
  • Max delivery pressure: 60000psi
  • 450cc cartridge size
  • Flow Rate: 70g per min
  • 750mm ultra-flexible hose
  • Air bleed valve simplifies air removal during loading
  • Multiple loading options (cartridge, bulk & suction)
  • Non-slip finish for better grip
  • Charging Time: 1 hour auto cut-off (±10min)

  • 16v Industrial Grease Gun - Skin Only

These wrenches feature a click type signal that alerts you when the required torque is reached, a reversible ratchet for clockwise torque only, and a scale adjuster for accurate and easy adjustment. The adjuster lock will hold your required setting during use, and the easy-to-read scale with a convex lens makes it simple to see the bold scale numbering (N-m scale only). Plus, the quick release mechanism makes using these wrenches a breeze. See below for the different sizes available:

name: CUSTOM SERIES 14D ROLLERCABINET EMPTY
description:
The Custom Series Roller cabinets from SP Tools are the tool carts you can always count on. With their sturdy construction and famous American appearance and quality, these carts are the perfect partner for your workshop. The heavy double-wall construction allows the tool carts to have a top load capacity of up to 200 kg.

The luxury of this series is evident in the thick ball bearing drawer slides and ultra-soft wheels. Each drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40 kg and the deep and large drawers even have a maximum load capacity of up to 80 kg! The 100% drawer opening allows you to make optimal use of each drawer and organize all your tools and accessories neatly and orderly.

With the handle on the side of the cart, the cart is easy to steer and you are super maneuverable and flexible while working. The cart can also be expanded with a matching top chest or hitch cabinets for extra storage. The Custom Series Tool Carts are available in black metallic and with three different color handles, so you can match your corporate identity perfectly. If you have a special request regarding color, please feel free to contact us.

In short, with the Custom Series Tool Carts from SP Tools, you have a reliable cart you can count on. These tool carts are of high quality, user-friendly, and have a beautiful design. Perfect for any professional looking for a reliable partner in their workshop. Order your Custom Series Tool Cart now from SP Tools!

With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.

  • Protect your corners with corner protection.

Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.

name: WORKSHOP SERIES 4 PC WIDE CABINET TIMBER TOP
description:
The Workshop Series is the perfect way to give your workshop the professional look you want. These systems are of very good quality. The systems can be placed against the wall as on their own. The layout can be assembled to your own taste and can be supplied with a luxury wooden top or a thick stainless steel top. 

The drawers are 100% extendable, ball-bearing softclose slides, all top cabinets have double gas dampers for extra ease of use. 

Hooks, brackets, lighting & other accessories are also available to customize your workshop wall

 

Construction:

This in combination with our softclose drawer slides (ball bearing), makes this the perfect professional fit for your workshop.

name: SUMO SERIES TOOLKIT 365 PCS BLACK/BLUE
description:
The SP SUMO Series is the answer to the American style rollercabinets. This robust trolley is completely built of double-walled steel. This series is known for its popular rectangular design in combination with its heavy duty quality. This trolley can also be customized in the colors of your workshop to form a perfect whole in your workshop.

 

Construction: 

The SP SUMO Series is a very solid cart that is completely welded with a double-walled construction. All this is finished with a double layer of powder coating to guarantee a long lifetime. All this in combination with the ball-bearing drawer slides with softclose makes this the ideal trolley with an excellent lifetime. This model also has a central locking system with a unique key on the front of the trolley/box and clicklok drawer locking on all drawers.

name: USA SUMO SERIES TOPBOX 1500MM
description:
The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

Compatible with:

  • SP44725-BLK

With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

name: CUSTOM SERIE - SPRAY CAN HOLDER
description:
The Custom Series Roller cabinets from SP Tools are the tool carts you can always count on. With their sturdy construction and famous American appearance and quality, these carts are the perfect partner for your workshop. The heavy double-wall construction allows the tool carts to have a top load capacity of up to 200 kg.

The luxury of this series is evident in the thick ball bearing drawer slides and ultra-soft wheels. Each drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40 kg and the deep and large drawers even have a maximum load capacity of up to 80 kg! The 100% drawer opening allows you to make optimal use of each drawer and organize all your tools and accessories neatly and orderly.

With the handle on the side of the cart, the cart is easy to steer and you are super maneuverable and flexible while working. The cart can also be expanded with a matching top chest or hitch cabinets for extra storage. The Custom Series Tool Carts are available in black metallic and with three different color handles, so you can match your corporate identity perfectly. If you have a special request regarding color, please feel free to contact us.

In short, with the Custom Series Tool Carts from SP Tools, you have a reliable cart you can count on. These tool carts are of high quality, user-friendly, and have a beautiful design. Perfect for any professional looking for a reliable partner in their workshop. Order your Custom Series Tool Cart now from SP Tools!

name: CUSTOM SERIES 5D TOPBOX EMPTY
description:
The Custom Series Roller cabinets from SP Tools are the tool carts you can always count on. With their sturdy construction and famous American appearance and quality, these carts are the perfect partner for your workshop. The heavy double-wall construction allows the tool carts to have a top load capacity of up to 200 kg.

The luxury of this series is evident in the thick ball bearing drawer slides and ultra-soft wheels. Each drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40 kg and the deep and large drawers even have a maximum load capacity of up to 80 kg! The 100% drawer opening allows you to make optimal use of each drawer and organize all your tools and accessories neatly and orderly.

With the handle on the side of the cart, the cart is easy to steer and you are super maneuverable and flexible while working. The cart can also be expanded with a matching top chest or hitch cabinets for extra storage. The Custom Series Tool Carts are available in black metallic and with three different color handles, so you can match your corporate identity perfectly. If you have a special request regarding color, please feel free to contact us.

In short, with the Custom Series Tool Carts from SP Tools, you have a reliable cart you can count on. These tool carts are of high quality, user-friendly, and have a beautiful design. Perfect for any professional looking for a reliable partner in their workshop. Order your Custom Series Tool Cart now from SP Tools!

name: VACUUM BRAKE BLEEDER KIT - 800ML
description:
Check out the features and benefits of our Vacuum Brake Bleeder:

  • Compact Size for easy operation in wheel arch area
  • Universal rubber fitting securely holds on brake bleed screw
  • Quick connect coupler for easy hose interchange
  • Convenient hanging hook and quick release trigger for hands-free operation
  • Float valve shuts off vacuum when container is full to prevent brake fluid spray
  • Internal shut off valve prevents fluid spills when not in use
  • Clear drain hose for visible inspection of old fluid during bleeding
  • Uses compressed air to generate deep vacuum for bleeding hydraulic brake systems
  • Reduces repair times and increases productivity
  • New design with built-in safety valves to prevent accidental fluid spray and spillage

Discover the features and benefits of our Brake Fluid Reservoir Re-filler:

  • Automatically bleeds brakes and refills fluid reservoir
  • Retaining clip for positive clamping on all master cylinder reservoir types
  • Height adjustment filler maintains correct fluid level during brake bleeding
  • Positive venting system for continual fluid flow
  • On-off tap for easy use and storage, eliminates fluid spills

name: TECH SERIES 13D ROLLERCABINET 411 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace 

  • Get a toolbox with a 25% thicker steel dog bone style frame for maximum rigidity
  • Enjoy soft close drawers with heavy duty full extension ball bearing drawer slides
  • Work on a stainless steel worktop
  • Keep your tools secure with the SP Cliklok drawer locking system
  • Extra security with an internal locking system
  • Convenient side storage compartments for aerosol cans
  • Corner protection for added durability
  • Easy mobility with heavy duty castors, 2 of which are lockable swivel
  • Includes a paper towel holder for quick clean-ups
  • Additional side storage compartment/bin for organization

name: SP TOOLS MERCHANDISE - BEANIE
description:
Stay warm and stylish with the SP Tools Beanie, featuring our iconic logo. This beanie is designed for comfort and durability, perfect for chilly days on the job or casual outings. Made from high-quality materials, it provides excellent warmth and a snug fit, making it an essential accessory for any professional or enthusiast.

Features:

  • High-Quality Materials: Soft and durable fabric ensures lasting comfort and warmth.
  • Snug Fit: Stretchable design fits most head sizes comfortably.
  • Iconic SP Tools Logo: Prominently displayed logo shows your pride in using professional-grade tools.
  • Versatile Style: Ideal for both work and casual wear.
  • Easy Care: Simple to wash and maintain.

Whether you're working outdoors, in the garage, or just out and about, the SP Tools Beanie with Logo keeps you warm while showcasing your dedication to quality tools. Perfect for any professional who values both function and style.

With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.

name: USA SUMO SERIES 13D ROLLERCABINET + TOPBOX
description:
The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

TECH SERIES 13D ROLLERCABINET 411 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace 

  • Get a toolbox with a 25% thicker steel dog bone style frame for maximum rigidity
  • Enjoy soft close drawers with heavy duty full extension ball bearing drawer slides
  • Work on a stainless steel worktop
  • Keep your tools secure with the SP Cliklok drawer locking system
  • Extra security with an internal locking system
  • Convenient side storage compartments for aerosol cans
  • Corner protection for added durability
  • Easy mobility with heavy duty castors, 2 of which are lockable swivel
  • Includes a paper towel holder for quick clean-ups
  • Additional side storage compartment/bin for organization

name: SPANNER 16 MM INSULATED OPEN-END
description:
The SP Tools VDE Spanners are specially designed with safety and efficiency in mind when working with electrical components. These spanners feature VDE (Verband der Elektrotechnik) standards, meaning they are insulated to provide protection against electric shocks of up to 1000V.

Each spanner is made of durable chrome vanadium steel, which not only withstands daily use, but also ensures long-lasting performance without compromising safety. The spanners have a comfortable, non-slip handle that ensures a firm grip and less fatigue, even during prolonged use.

With SP Tools VDE Wrenches, you won't have to worry about the risk of electric shock when working on switchboards, switches, wiring or other electrical installations. The insulated handles provide an extra layer of protection and help prevent accidents.

name: SMART BATTERY CHARGER - 8 STAGE MULTI VOLT - 26A
description:
FEATURES

  • Built-in microchip charging control and monitoring system
  • Zero volt minimum start – can charge a completely flat battery
  • Optimally designed charging cycle designed for Lead Acid, Gel, AGM and Lithium batteries
  • Automatic Voltage Recognition - Charger will automatically recognise the connected batteries voltage and enter into charging state within a few seconds
  • Engine Start Assist - Aids in starting vehicles with flat batteries
  • Overcharge protection, protecting the battery from damage due to overcharging
  • Reverse polarity, short circuit, overload and high temperature protection
  • LED display showing battery voltage, current and charging status
  • Neat onboard storage for cables and alligator clips
  • Large carry handle for ease of use and transport

SPECIFICATIONS

  • Current Output: 26 Amp
  • Output Voltage (Nom): 6, 12 & 24 Volt
  • Battery Type Supported: LEAD ACID, GEL, AGM & LITHIUM
  • Charge Stages: 8 Stages

WARNING: Batteries contain corrosive liquid. Always wear approved gloves and goggles when handling batteries or battery acid.If battery acid contacts skin, wash off immediately and contact a doctor for further advice.

name: USA SUMO SERIES 19D ROLLERCABINET + TOPBOX
description:
The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

name: T8 SPANNER 6MM METRIC ROE
description:
Check out our 888 Series wrenches! These wrenches come in 27 different sizes ranging from 6mm to 50mm.

Our wrenches feature dual flat drive technology, allowing for maximum contact with the fastener and reducing the risk of damage. The small head profile is perfect for working in tight spaces.

Made from Chrome Vanadium Steel (Cr-V) with a tough triple chrome, high polish finish, these wrenches are built to last. They also meet and exceed international ANSI and DIN standards. Get yours today!

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

name: TECH SERIES 9D ROLLERCABINET 387 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.

name: JUMPSTARTER 4300A 12/24V
description:
Reliable On-the-Go Power Solution

Introducing our Jumpstarter 4300A, the ideal companion for your outdoor adventures and everyday needs. This power bank is engineered to keep your smartphones, tablets, and other low-voltage USB devices charged and operational, no matter where you are.

With its substantial capacity, the Lithium-ion battery allows you to power or charge multiple devices simultaneously, ensuring you never run out of juice while on the go. One of its standout features is the built-in LED light, which offers five different modes, including an emergency strobe and SOS signal. This makes it an essential tool for camping trips, hikes, or any situation where you may need a reliable light source.

Additionally, the power bank includes heavy-duty starter cables and clamps that can be neatly stored away. These durable cables are perfect for efficiently jump-starting your vehicle, providing you with peace of mind during your travels.

Designed with advanced technology, the power bank boasts a fast-charging capability, allowing it to be fully charged within just eight hours. This ensures that you can quickly get back to using your devices without long wait times. Safety is also a top priority; the power bank is equipped with automatic protections against short circuits, overloads, overcharging, and over-discharging. It even features reverse polarity indication, preventing accidental misuse.

Whether you’re exploring the great outdoors, embarking on a road trip, or simply need a reliable power source during your daily activities, our Jumpstarter 4300A is your go-to solution. Its robust features and commitment to safety ensure that you stay connected and powered up, no matter where your adventures take you.


Specifications

  • Peak current: 4,320 amps - Voltage: 12V , 24V
  • Starting capacity: All 12V Petrol engines
  • 12V Diesel engines up to 10L
  • 24V Diesel engines up to 6L
  • Battery: Li-ion 36000mAH (133.2Wh) 30/120C
  • Input: 13.8V 2A
  • DC Output: 12V
  • USB Output: 5V

name: USA SUMO SERIES 16D ROLLERCABINET EMPTY
description:
• Double-walled 2x 1.5mm super duty steel construction
  • SP One touch Cliclock Lad locking device
  • Double drawer bank on 2 sides drawers
  • Durable hard industrialuv resistant powder coating
  • With perfowall on both sides
  • Includes recycle garbage can, paper roll holder & Spray can holders
  • Floating top shelf for easy clamping of materials.
  • Suitable for vice mounting
  • The ultimate heavy duty industrial cart
Wheel setup:
  • 2 heavy duty casters with brake
  • 2 heavy duty fixed wheels without brake
Drawer dimensions in mm:
  • 4 open top drawers 570Bx405D
  • 4 low drawers 570Bx405Dx50H
  • 6 medium drawers 570Bx405Dx75H 
  • 2 deep drawers 570Wx405Dx250H

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5mm steel and a load weight of 400kg+ on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers are capable of supporting up to 120kg each and have "One Touch Click-lok" and "Kitchen Style Softclose" what makes working with them very pleasant.

With a depth of more than 620mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version of 1850mm long, this tool trolley offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with various tops & side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

Apart from space and strength, this tool trolley also offers plenty of possibilities. In fact, with the built-in electricity cable pass-through & magnetic power boards, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

In short, if you are looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, then the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is exactly what you need!

name: MULTI-FUNCTION SMART TOOL WITH WIFI & BUILT-IN PRINTER - 5 TOOLS IN 1
description:
Features

The SP Smart Tool is a powerful 5-in-1 automotive diagnostic and testing device built into a robust Android-based tablet. Designed for modern workshops, it supports full system diagnostics for over 100 vehicle brands across Europe, America, Asia, and China. It offers 20+ maintenance functions, CAN FD, DoIP, and multiple diagnostic protocols. A built-in printer allows technicians to instantly print reports, while 64GB of storage makes it easy to save and compare historical data.

5 Tools in 1

1. Battery Analyzer

  • Out-of-car and In-car testing modes

  • Tests battery health and cold start performance

  • Barcode scanning for quick setup

  • Battery matching/reset function

  • Supports global standards (CA, CCA, SAE, JIS, DIN, EN, etc.)

  • Built-in printer for instant report output

2. TPMS Tester (Tyre Pressure Monitoring System)

  • Activates and programs most OEM and universal TPMS sensors

  • Reads, copies, and writes sensor IDs

  • Supports 315MHz/433MHz sensors

  • Displays tyre pressure, temperature, and sensor battery status

  • Clears TPMS fault codes and relearns sensors

  • Covers 98% of vehicles with TPMS

3. Diagnostic Tester

  • Full system scan via OBD (DLC)

  • Reads/clears DTCs (generic and OEM-specific)

  • Live Data viewing (text, waveform, merged graph)

  • Actuation tests for system components

  • Pre- and post-repair report comparison

  • Diagnostic data recording

  • Software and APK updates

4. Vehicle Maintenance

Quick-access dial for common service functions:

  • Oil reset, EPB reset, ABS bleeding

  • DPF regeneration, throttle reset, injector coding

  • TPMS reset, battery maintenance, IMMO, gearbox matching

  • Sunroof, suspension, EGR, window, and seat calibration

  • NOx reset, AdBlue reset, A/F reset, Stop/Start reset

  • Transport mode, coolant bleed, and more

5. Videoscope Support (Optional – SP61173)*

  • Forward and side-facing cameras

  • Ideal for internal inspection of engines and tight areas

  • Requires optional probe attachment

Kit Includes

  • SP Smart Tool tablet

  • DLC diagnostic cable

  • Battery clamp cables

  • USB Type-C cable

  • 12V auxiliary power cable

  • OBD-I adaptor box

  • Non-16-pin adaptor kit

  • Heavy-duty blow mold carry case

Specifications

  • Operating System: Android 10

  • Memory: 4GB RAM

  • Storage: 64GB

  • Display: 5.99" capacitive touch screen (720x1440)

  • Camera: 8MP rear

  • Wi-Fi: Dual band 2.4GHz/5GHz

  • Battery: 4500mAh / 7.6V

  • Operating Temp: 0°C to 45°C

  • Storage Temp: -10°C to 60°C

Connectivity

  • DB15 diagnostic port

  • USB Type-A & Type-C ports

  • Circular connector for battery tester

  • OBD-II and OBD-I (with adaptors)

  • Wi-Fi enabled

name: USA SUMO SERIES 9D ROLLERCABINET EMPTY
description:
SP Tools USA series is extremely popular in the United States. Effective immediately, these large and luxurious USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems are also available in Europe. With this new line, SP Tools again makes innovation and quality accessible to every technician.

The SP Tools USA Series originated from practice. More and more technicians in the United States contacted us with the desire for large multifunctional tool carts and wall systems. The result is the new SP Tools USA Series with two product lines: USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems. 

Unique to the SP Tools USA Series is its competitive pricing, which allows SP Tools to make professional work accessible to a wide audience.

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5 mm steel and a load capacity of 400 kg on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers can carry up to 120 kg each and have “One Touch Click-lok” and “Kitchen Style Softclose”, which makes working with it very pleasant.

With a depth of over 620 mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version at 1850 mm long, this tool cart offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with different top and side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

 

In addition to space and power, this tool cart also offers many features. With built-in power cable grommet and magnetic power panels, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

 

In short, if you're looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is just what you need!

name: CUSTOM SERIES 10D ROLLERCABINET + TOPBOX
description:
The Custom Series Roller cabinets from SP Tools are the tool carts you can always count on. With their sturdy construction and famous American appearance and quality, these carts are the perfect partner for your workshop. The heavy double-wall construction allows the tool carts to have a top load capacity of up to 200 kg.

The luxury of this series is evident in the thick ball bearing drawer slides and ultra-soft wheels. Each drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40 kg and the deep and large drawers even have a maximum load capacity of up to 80 kg! The 100% drawer opening allows you to make optimal use of each drawer and organize all your tools and accessories neatly and orderly.

With the handle on the side of the cart, the cart is easy to steer and you are super maneuverable and flexible while working. The cart can also be expanded with a matching top chest or hitch cabinets for extra storage. The Custom Series Tool Carts are available in black metallic and with three different color handles, so you can match your corporate identity perfectly. If you have a special request regarding color, please feel free to contact us.

In short, with the Custom Series Tool Carts from SP Tools, you have a reliable cart you can count on. These tool carts are of high quality, user-friendly, and have a beautiful design. Perfect for any professional looking for a reliable partner in their workshop. Order your Custom Series Tool Cart now from SP Tools!

name: TECH SERIES 9D VDE ROLLERCABINET 199 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.

name: USA SERIES 9D ROLLERCABINET 640 PIECES
description:
SP Tools USA series is extremely popular in the United States. Effective immediately, these large and luxurious USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems are also available in Europe. With this new line, SP Tools again makes innovation and quality accessible to every technician.

The SP Tools USA Series originated from practice. More and more technicians in the United States contacted us with the desire for large multifunctional tool carts and wall systems. The result is the new SP Tools USA Series with two product lines: USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems. 

Unique to the SP Tools USA Series is its competitive pricing, which allows SP Tools to make professional work accessible to a wide audience.

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5 mm steel and a load capacity of 400 kg on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers can carry up to 120 kg each and have “One Touch Click-lok” and “Kitchen Style Softclose”, which makes working with it very pleasant.

With a depth of over 620 mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version at 1850 mm long, this tool cart offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with different top and side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

 

In addition to space and power, this tool cart also offers many features. With built-in power cable grommet and magnetic power panels, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

 

In short, if you're looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is just what you need!

name: USA SUMO SERIES 19D ROLLERCABINET EMPTY
description:
SP Tools USA series is extremely popular in the United States. Effective immediately, these large and luxurious USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems are also available in Europe. With this new line, SP Tools again makes innovation and quality accessible to every technician.

The SP Tools USA Series originated from practice. More and more technicians in the United States contacted us with the desire for large multifunctional tool carts and wall systems. The result is the new SP Tools USA Series with two product lines: USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems. 

Unique to the SP Tools USA Series is its competitive pricing, which allows SP Tools to make professional work accessible to a wide audience.

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5 mm steel and a load capacity of 400 kg on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers can carry up to 120 kg each and have “One Touch Click-lok” and “Kitchen Style Softclose”, which makes working with it very pleasant.

With a depth of over 620 mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version at 1850 mm long, this tool cart offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with different top and side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

 

In addition to space and power, this tool cart also offers many features. With built-in power cable grommet and magnetic power panels, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

 

In short, if you're looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is just what you need!

TECH SERIES 13D ROLLERCABINET 388 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace 

  • Get a toolbox with a 25% thicker steel dog bone style frame for maximum rigidity
  • Enjoy soft close drawers with heavy duty full extension ball bearing drawer slides
  • Work on a stainless steel worktop
  • Keep your tools secure with the SP Cliklok drawer locking system
  • Extra security with an internal locking system
  • Convenient side storage compartments for aerosol cans
  • Corner protection for added durability
  • Easy mobility with heavy duty castors, 2 of which are lockable swivel
  • Includes a paper towel holder for quick clean-ups
  • Additional side storage compartment/bin for organization

name: USA SERIES 18D ROLLERCABINET 622 PIECES
description:
SP Tools USA series is extremely popular in the United States. Effective immediately, these large and luxurious USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems are also available in Europe. With this new line, SP Tools again makes innovation and quality accessible to every technician.

The SP Tools USA Series originated from practice. More and more technicians in the United States contacted us with the desire for large multifunctional tool carts and wall systems. The result is the new SP Tools USA Series with two product lines: USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems. 

Unique to the SP Tools USA Series is its competitive pricing, which allows SP Tools to make professional work accessible to a wide audience.

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5 mm steel and a load capacity of 400 kg on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers can carry up to 120 kg each and have “One Touch Click-lok” and “Kitchen Style Softclose”, which makes working with it very pleasant.

With a depth of over 620 mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version at 1850 mm long, this tool cart offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with different top and side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

 

In addition to space and power, this tool cart also offers many features. With built-in power cable grommet and magnetic power panels, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

 

In short, if you're looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is just what you need!

name: SOCKET 1/4" 5MM XTREME GRIP
description:
CENTRE DRIVE TECHNOLOGY

Undo even the most stubborn bolts — up to 90% rounded.
Our reinvented socket design focuses pressure on the center of the fastener’s flats, delivering maximum torque to bolts that were previously unmanageable.

A tough, triple chrome high-polish finish ensures easy clean-up.
Twin knurling on sockets offers improved grip — especially in oily or greasy conditions.
Crafted from high-strength Chrome Vanadium Steel (Cr-V) for exceptional durability.

name: TECH SERIES 13D ROLLERCABINET 412 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley has 100% drawer opening and each low drawer has a maximum load capacity of 40kg and the high drawers a whopping 80kg. Thanks to these features, you can use all drawers optimally and neatly organize all your tools and accessories in different drawers of the tool trolley.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace 

  • Get a toolbox with a 25% thicker steel dog bone style frame for maximum rigidity
  • Enjoy soft close drawers with heavy duty full extension ball bearing drawer slides
  • Work on a stainless steel worktop
  • Keep your tools secure with the SP Cliklok drawer locking system
  • Extra security with an internal locking system
  • Convenient side storage compartments for aerosol cans
  • Corner protection for added durability
  • Easy mobility with heavy duty castors, 2 of which are lockable swivel
  • Includes a paper towel holder for quick clean-ups
  • Additional side storage compartment/bin for organization

name: TOOLKIT 622 PC IN USA SERIES ROLLERCABINET XXL BLACK WITH TOP AND SIDES
description:
SP Tools USA series is extremely popular in the United States. Effective immediately, these large and luxurious USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems are also available in Europe. With this new line, SP Tools again makes innovation and quality accessible to every technician.

The SP Tools USA Series originated from practice. More and more technicians in the United States contacted us with the desire for large multifunctional tool carts and wall systems. The result is the new SP Tools USA Series with two product lines: USA Sumo tool carts and USA Workshop wall systems. 

Unique to the SP Tools USA Series is its competitive pricing, which allows SP Tools to make professional work accessible to a wide audience.

The USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is the ultimate workstation. With an extremely strong double-wall construction of 2 x 1.5 mm steel and a load capacity of 400 kg on top of the cart, this roller cabinet is unbeatable. The drawers can carry up to 120 kg each and have “One Touch Click-lok” and “Kitchen Style Softclose”, which makes working with it very pleasant.

With a depth of over 620 mm and a choice of three width sizes, including the largest version at 1850 mm long, this tool cart offers not only strength but also plenty of space. It is possible to expand the cart with different top and side cabinets to create your own mobile workstation.

 

In addition to space and power, this tool cart also offers many features. With built-in power cable grommet and magnetic power panels, this series is perfect for use with various diagnostic equipment. For example, you can easily hang a monitor on the back wall and mount a printer inside the cabinet.

 

In short, if you're looking for a roller cabinet that combines power, space and features, the USA Series roller cabinet from SP Tools is just what you need!


Dimensions drawers left

  • 1x wide drawer: 1367W x 575D x 73H 
  • 1x wide drawer: 1367W x 575D x 50H 
  • 3x low drawers: 735W x 575D x 50H 
  • 1x medium drawers: 735W x 575D x 73H 
  • 1x deep drawer: 1367W x 575D x 160H

name: MAG LIGHT BANK 3PC WITH CHARGING DOCK
description:
FEATURES

  • 3x Compact “pocket” size, super bright dimmable work lights combined with a charging/mounting dock that allows for the use of the work lights separately or combined as a single ultra bright flood light

  • When in combined use, all lights are adjusted from a single light

  • Each light includes a 180° fold out magnetic base, allowing users to fix lights to any ferrous metal surface

  • Up to 700 Lumens per flood light can be combined to output an ultra bright 2100 Lumens of power

  • 2 to 18 hour run time

  • Charging options – lights can be charged individually using USB type C cable, or in the docking station using the supplied charger and high current cable

  • Heavy duty charging dock includes a 90° fold out magnetic base and includes a built-in tri-pod compatible threaded hole

SPECIFICATIONS

  • Charging Dock: 5V 3.5A

  • Charger: 100–240VAC ~50/60Hz

  • Battery: 3.7V 2600mAh Li-ion (per light)

  • Charging time: Approx. 3.5 hours

  • Operation time:

    • HIGH: Approx. 2 hours

    • LOW: Approx. 18 hours

  • Brightness:

    • HIGH: 700 Lumen

    • LOW: 70 Lumen (per light)

  • IP65 Splash & dust resistant

  • IK07 Impact resistant (2 joules of impact)

name: TECH SERIES 9D TOOLKIT 366 PIECES
description:
Looking for the perfect partner for your workshop? Then the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the choice for you! With its robust construction and unique "dog-bone" design, this tool trolley is not only a real eye-catcher, but also the ideal addition to your workshop. The double-walled construction of this trolley has a load capacity of 300kg on top of the cart, allowing you to easily place all your belongings on it.

The luxurious appearance of this Series is reflected in various features of the trolley, such as the thick ball bearing drawer guides and the ultra soft wheels. In addition, the Tech Series comes standard with a built-in spray can holder, paper roll holder and garbage can on the sides for optimal ease of use. This way, you have everything within reach and keep your workplace tidy and organized.

The Tech Series tool trolley is available in Diamond Black and comes in three different handle colors. In addition, it is possible to customize the color of the trolley to match your corporate identity. This makes it perfect for the look of your workshop.

The Tech Series tool trolley is easy to maneuver thanks to the integrated handle on the side of the cart. This way, you are flexible and agile during your work. Would you like extra storage space? Then you can easily expand the trolley with a matching top box.

In short, the Tech Series tool trolley from SP Tools is the perfect addition to your workshop. With its robust construction, luxurious appearance and various convenient features, you are guaranteed an optimal workspace.
